name: Agent Swarm Canvas
description: A spatial node-graph canvas where AI agents appear as interactive nodes with real-time status, drag-to-connect edges, zoom/pan navigation, and a minimap for orchestration overview.

standard.description: Full spatial canvas with minimap, control bar, and status overlay — intended as a primary view for agent orchestration dashboards

compact.description: Reduced canvas without minimap or control bar, suitable for embedding in sidebars or secondary panels — agents render as smaller nodes with abbreviated labels

readonly.description: Non-interactive snapshot of the agent graph — no drag, no connect, no zoom controls — used for monitoring dashboards and historical playback

visual_brief: A dark, full-bleed spatial canvas with floating agent-node cards connected by animated bezier paths. Nodes show colored status rings (idle/running/error). Minimap in bottom-right, control bar bottom-center. Dot-grid background scales with zoom.

layout_hints.note: This is a full-bleed visualization. Do NOT wrap in a d-surface card. Agent nodes float freely within the canvas area.
layout_hints.node_interaction: Each agent node card MUST have cursor: pointer. Use d-surface[data-interactive] for clickable nodes. Clicking navigates to agent detail.
layout_hints.metrics: Display agent metrics with LABELED text, not icon-only. Good: 'Requests: 142 | Latency: 120ms'. Bad: '⚡ 142 ⬇ 120ms'. Icons without labels are unparseable.
layout_hints.status_consistency: All status badges MUST use d-annotation[data-status]. Every status includes a colored dot (8px circle) prefix for visual scanning. Consistent across all agents.
layout_hints.error_escalation: Agents with error status should have a subtle red border glow on their card: box-shadow: 0 0 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--d-error) 25%, transparent).

slots.canvas-viewport: The main infinite-scroll canvas area. Uses CSS transform for zoom/pan. Contains all agent nodes and connection paths positioned absolutely via x/y coordinates. Must handle pointer events for drag-to-connect, pan (middle-click or space+drag), and pinch-to-zoom. Background should render a subtle dot-grid pattern that scales with zoom level.
slots.agent-node: Repeating slot — one per agent. Each node is a rounded card (80–120px wide) positioned absolutely on the canvas. Shows agent name, avatar/icon, and a colored status ring: idle (gray/neutral), running (blue/primary with pulse animation), error (red/destructive with shake), complete (green/success with checkmark). Nodes have connection ports (small circles) on left and right edges for drag-to-connect wiring. Clicking a node expands it inline to show current task description and elapsed time. Nodes support drag repositioning.
slots.connection-line: SVG path elements drawn between agent-node connection ports. Uses bezier curves (cubic) with a slight droop. Animated dash pattern flows in the direction of data transfer. Line color reflects connection status: active (primary color, animated flow), idle (muted/dashed), error (destructive, static). Hovering a line shows a tooltip with the data payload summary being transferred.
slots.status-overlay: A translucent overlay panel anchored to the top-right of the canvas viewport. Shows aggregate swarm stats: total agents, running count, error count, completed count, and overall progress as a thin horizontal bar. Collapses to a single summary badge on compact viewports. Uses backdrop-blur for depth.
slots.control-bar: Horizontal toolbar anchored to the bottom-center of the canvas. Contains zoom-in, zoom-out, fit-to-view, and toggle-minimap icon buttons. Also includes a play/pause button for swarm execution and a reset-layout button that auto-arranges nodes using a force-directed algorithm. Buttons use icon-only rendering with tooltips on hover.
slots.minimap: A small (160×120px) overview panel anchored to the bottom-right corner. Renders a simplified, zoomed-out view of the entire node graph with colored dots for agents and thin lines for connections. Shows a draggable viewport rectangle indicating the current visible area. Semi-transparent background with subtle border.

keyboard: Tab: cycle through agent nodes in DOM order
Enter: expand selected agent node details
Escape: deselect current node or cancel drag

responsive.mobile: Canvas remains spatial but disables drag-to-connect (use tap-to-select then tap-target-to-connect two-step flow). Minimap hidden. Control bar simplifies to zoom + play/pause. Agent nodes render at minimum 64px width with truncated labels.
responsive.tablet: Full spatial canvas with minimap collapsed by default (toggle via control bar). Touch gestures: two-finger pan, pinch-to-zoom. Connection drag uses long-press to initiate.

composition.AgentSwarmCanvas: Viewport(d-section, spatial, full-bleed) > [CanvasLayer + StatusOverlay + ControlBar + Minimap?]
composition.AgentNode: Card(d-surface, data-interactive, positioned) > [Name + Avatar + StatusRing(pulse?: running) + TaskTooltip?]
composition.StatusOverlay: Panel(d-annotation, backdrop-blur, top-right) > [AgentCount + RunningCount + ErrorCount + ProgressBar]
composition.ControlBar: Bar(d-control, bottom-center) > [ZoomIn + ZoomOut + FitView + ToggleMinimap + PlayPause + ResetLayout]
